warnings.qualityFallback: Low resolution detected. Print details may be pixelated.
warnings.compressionDesc: Digital compression artifacts found; fine print details may be degraded.

warnings.aiAuditFailed: Automated print quality check is temporarily unavailable. Our prepress technicians will manually verify your design readiness before production.
warnings.ratioMismatchDesc: Your design has a {designRatio} aspect ratio, but your print size is {printWidth}x{printHeight} cm. Some cropping or padding will occur.
warnings.ratioMatchDesc: Your selected print size matches your design's aspect ratio exactly. No cropping required.
warnings.dynamicQuality: Low resolution ({dpi} DPI) detected. Details may be pixelated at {width}x{height}cm.
